Hi Jordan,

Thanks so much for hopping on a call last week. I'm excited to move forward with the
new website for Meridian Bakery. As discussed, here's what we're hoping for in the
first phase:

- A clean homepage with rotating photos of our pastry case
- An online ordering page for custom cake orders (no payment processing yet, just a
  form that emails our team)
- A page listing our two locations (Downtown and the new Riverside location opening
  in May)
- Basic mobile responsiveness

Budget-wise we talked about $3,500 for this phase, paid half up front and half on
delivery. Does that still work on your end?

My business partner Danny Ferro will probably loop in on some of these emails too
since he handles the Riverside location details.

Looking forward to seeing what you come up with!

Best,
Priya Shah
Owner, Meridian Bakery
